item.title: Return of the Meme: 1676 (Star Trek Sunday)
item.description:
Set Phasers to bread.
Big mood, Commander Worf.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Hm…
item.description: Happy to be doing my part
item.dc:creator: YELLOWnotYELLOW

item.title: The Great Shark Dump
item.description:
I don’t know much about cars but it looks fine to me
The hand falls through dimensions and become the Addams Thing
Love the album A Modest Proposal with such hits as “Let Them Eat (Cake)” and “Try Not to Think about how the Super Bowl is a human trafficking superevent and I own a private jet, but we can’t reasonably infer anything about that”
I am a content generator bot fed by coffee and decades of mass media inputs
I’m not at all cool
A wild title reference appeared
Is this bread?
Ain’t room enough under cost of living round these parts, reckon we oughta be roommates?
In my experience substances reveal the opposite philosophy
The trick is not minding that it hurts
Great character and performance
That’s how I ended up with this impeccable baggage
Imagine if we got a third
Groovy
Dude I paid for an eighth
Get yer crayons out fellers
Then beat god in Rock em sock em robots
Artie meet Leech
If I forget the mess as soon as I look away, it’s not there!
I’m not doing too bad actually
The Magicians Nephew
Could this come with a side of fries?
Alluring
“Try not to be a dick”
I would like to believe this world can be better
Ok, I may have created you to join my sexbot harem, but right now we have bigger problems, we’re out of coffee
Crazy how nature do that
New Liver, Same Eagle
The green headband look is kinda baller, ngl
Hey Dad, can we look at the toy aisle?
My sweet enduring horror
Rain is nurturing
But that giant spider in the corner wearing a tricorner hat and polishing a musket is definitely a stranger
Q
Posin’ with by brosen (that’s my chosen bros)
Forgot to get mustard while I was out!
Guys let’s go trick or treating early this year
We’re not gonna talk about Cat Tax. In fact we’re not gonna talk about cat tax at all!
item.dc:creator: vagrantvigilantepunk

item.title: Never take responsibility. . . .
item.description: The Constitution doesn't matter. People that join the military are suckers and losers. Billionaires shouldn't pay their fair share. Rape and pedophilia are just "men being men". You are only important if your skin is white. . . . .

item.title: That rock get the girl.
item.description: During a keeper talk at the San Diego Zoo, visitors gather as the otters are brought closer for a better look. One mother waddles up to the glass and proudly shows off her baby, instantly drawing “aww” reactions from the crowd. Moments later, the father joins in, but instead of another baby, he presents a small, smooth rock, holding it like it’s something valuable. He looks around as if expecting the same attention, and the keeper jokes that he’s basically trying to join the moment with his own “show and tell,” since otters sometimes get attached to favorite objects. The baby wins hearts, but the dad’s rock ends up stealing the biggest laugh
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Very small PBF dump
item.dc:creator: ameanstoanend

item.title: Manufacturing Drones
item.description: Saw a video of a teacher recently where she was claiming students are so dependent on LLM that they are turning in essay completely written using it. This is becoming increasingly common. When the teacher probed the students, they kept starting their explanations with "Well, according to chat-gpt..."; then, the teacher asked, "how do you know chat-gpt is right?", not a single student was able to provide an answer. This is FUBAR! Our countries, infested with kleptocratic capitalism, will favor this because drones make good slaves. To quote a certain Cheeto bitch "I love the poorly educated" People who doesn't care about this stand to benefit from slavery and support it! Dont be an idiot! Teach your kids critical thinking and critical theories. Future needs to fight for what's coming. We need to give them the weapons they will need.
item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.title: Ukrainian drones just hit a Russian Karakurt-class missile corvette at Primorsk port in the Baltic.
item.description: The ship was reportedly sent to defend Russia's largest Baltic oil terminal from Ukrainian drones.

item.title: Human evolution didn't slow down; Large DNA study reveals natural selection led to more redheads and less male-pattern baldness (also bad news for those with leprosy)
item.description: Over the past 10,000 years, evolution in West Eurasia has been selecting for light skin, red hair and resistance to HIV and leprosy in humans, according to a new study. The research found that genes linked to lighter skin tones, resistance to leprosy and HIV, lower risk of alcoholism, lower rates of male-pattern baldness, and reduced likelihood of bipolar disorder and schizophrenia also increased over time. On the less encouraging side, celiac disease and Crohn’s disease genes became more prevalent alongside the widespread farming of wheat, which researchers acknowledged was a somewhat baffling trade-off. “This work allows us to assign place and time to forces that shaped us,” he said. The team plans to take the research to East Asia and East Africa next, hunting for additional genetic variations that could eventually help with disease prevention. The redheads, for their part, can enjoy the moment. https://www.livescience.com/archaeology/human-evolution/human-evolution-didnt-slow-down-we-were-just-missing-the-signal-large-dna-study-reveals-natural-selection-led-to-more-redheads-and-less-male-pattern-baldness https://www.vice.com/en/article/there-are-more-redheads-than-ever-thanks-to-an-unexpected-evolutionary-twist/ Redhead Festival will get more crowded ... https://www.forbes.com/sites/ceciliarodriguez/2017/08/19/for-redheads-only-gingers-head-to-holland-for-their-biggest-festival-in-the-world/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Meme resistance.
item.description:
#1 - Burning warehouses is good for the environment.
#2 - A sticker I left on the door of a "Bikers for Trump" bar near me.
#3 - This kid is a legend.
#4 - I use my veteran privilege to be on the front lines of protests and hopefully prevent this from happening.
#5 - Nope. Not tolerating fascists.
#6 - I write for FREE about being a teacher, a leftist activist and my time in the army at www.patreon.com/c/BikerJedi
#7 - This is what MAGA wants for all women.
#8 - Cognitive dissonance is a bitch.
#9 - And MAGA raised money for this scum.
#10 - ICE is killing in the streets and raping minors in the camps.
#11 - Not socialism!
#12 - My protest sign.
#13 - The workers must NEVER be disarmed.
#14 - NTC, #1988. Today I use my limited skills to help my other leftists.
#15 - This is where I'm at.
#16 - You can't argue with idiots.
#17 - Every single morning.
#18 - Dog Tax. RIP to old man Bean. He was a happy little guy.
item.dc:creator: Loctavius

item.title: SLAVA UKRAINI!
item.description: Ukraine’s Defense Forces have struck two vessels from Russia’s shadow fleet in the waters near the entrance to the port of Novorossiysk, President Zelensky announced. The tankers were actively used to transport Russian oil. Not complaining but I was notified this hit "Most Viral" with only 56 upvotes...used to take a couple hundred!

item.dc:creator: HandsomeAndstreb

item.title: Spiders Are Friends
item.description: Every time a new reader, somewhere in the world, comes across our comic and laughs, their face pops up before our inner mind's eye. They become part of the War and Peas World. This world is fueled by actual imagination and is 100% human-made (except for the occasional alien intervention). It's been built through years of joy-filled and gut-wrenching work alike. There are no shortcuts. No schemes. But there is much laughter! We see you chuckle and dance, skipping along your merry day. And honestly? That's what keeps us going. If you'd like to help us keep creating, consider supporting us on Patreon. Your support means we can keep drawing comics instead of getting real jobs. https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
